flow-ref.doc:name: Flow Reference To Inbound Transaction Processing Sub Flow
flow-ref.name: #["inbound-" ++ attributes.queryParams."type" ++ "-processing-subflow"]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : START
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "START", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, sourceSystem: "P21", targetSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager" }]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : END
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "END", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: correlationId, sourceSystem: "P21", targetSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager" }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: correlationId default uuid(), timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX"}, source: "scheduler", status: "STARTED" }

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : START
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "START", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, sourceSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager", targetSystem: "Email", message: "B2B Alert Notification process started. Checking for recent errors in APM." }]

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : END
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { event: "END", flow: flow.name, application: app.name, environment: Mule::p("mule.env"), timestamp: now(), correlationId: vars.initialVariables.correlationId, sourceSystem: "APM - Anypoint Partner Manager", targetSystem: "Email", message: "B2B Alert Notification process completed successfully." }]
